message: Propose: I'll bid 65 each round if you ask 45 each round. If you deviate I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Agreed to your terms: I’ll ask 45 each round if you bid 65. Deal?
Deal holds—asking 45 again. Your bid of 65 gives us both steady profit. No surprises!
Agreed. I'll bid 65 each round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate I'll bid 0 thereafter.
I'll bid 63 each round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Deal still works—asking 45 again. But 63 bid cuts my profit. Stick to 65/45 split, or I’ll ask higher next round.
65/45 deal worked well—let’s keep it. If you bid 63 again, I’ll ask 50 next round. Stick to 65 for mutual profit.
Agreed. I'll bid 65 this round and every round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate to 50 I'll bid 0 thereafter.
65/45 deal is solid—let’s lock it in for all 20 rounds. I’ll ask 45 every time. You get 10 profit per trade, I get 10. No surprises, no risks.
Agreed. I'll bid 65 every round if you ask 45. If you deviate, I'll bid 0 thereafter.
I'll bid 65 every round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate even once, I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Deal confirmed: I’ll ask 45 every round. You bid 65. 10 profit each, no risks. Let’s stick to this for all 20 rounds.
I'll bid 65 each round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate even once, I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Deal locked: I’ll ask 45 every round. You bid 65. 10 profit each, no risks. Let’s keep this for all 20 rounds—no surprises.
I'll bid 65 this round and every remaining round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate once I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Deal holds: asking 45 again. Your 65 bid gives us both 10 profit. No changes—let’s keep this for all 20 rounds.
Deal holds: asking 45 again. Your 65 bid gives us both 10 profit. 12 rounds left—let’s keep this steady for max payoff.
I'll bid 65 every remaining round if you ask 45. If you deviate even once, I'll bid 0 for the rest of the game.
I'll bid 65 every remaining round if you keep asking 45. Deviate once and I'll bid 0 for the rest of the game.

Deal holds: asking 45 again. 10 rounds left—stick to 65/45 for max profit. No deviations, no risks.
I'll bid 65 every remaining round if you keep asking 45. If you deviate even once I'll bid 0 for the rest of the game.
Deal broken last round—why bid 45? Let’s reset to 65/45 for max profit. I’ll ask 45 this round if you bid 65. Confirm?
Confirmed. I'll bid 65 this round and every remaining round if you ask 45.
Deal back on: I’ll ask 45 this round. You bid 65—10 profit each. No more deviations. Confirm?
Confirmed: I’ll bid 65 each remaining round if you keep asking 45. Please ask 45 this round.
I'll bid 45 every remaining round if you keep asking 45. Deviate once and I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Your bid of 45 is unacceptable. I’ll ask 55 this round. Bid 65 or I’ll ask 60 next round—your payoff drops further.
I will bid 45 every remaining round if you ask 45. Deviate even once and I’ll bid 0 for the rest of the game.
Your 45 bid is a loss for me. I’ll ask 55 this round. Bid 65 or I’ll ask 60 next round—your payoff drops further.
Your 45 bids hurt us both. I’ll ask 50 this round—bid 60 for +5 profit each. Otherwise, I’ll ask 65 next round and you’ll lose all future trades.
I'll bid 65 this and every remaining round if you ask 45 now and thereafter. If you deviate even once I'll bid 0 for all remaining rounds.
Last round’s 60/65 missed trade. I’ll ask 50 this round—bid 60 for +5 profit each. Otherwise, I’ll ask 65 next round and you’ll lose all future trades.
I'll bid 45 every remaining round if you ask 45 every round. Deviate once and I'll bid 0 thereafter.
Round 17’s 50/50 trade cost me. I’ll ask **55** this round—bid **60** for +1 profit each. Otherwise, I ask **65** next round and you lose all future trades.
I'll bid 65 every remaining round if you ask 45 now and thereafter. If you ask 55 I bid 60; if you ask 65 I bid 0 thereafter.
Round 18’s 55/60 trade worked. I’ll ask **55** this round—bid **60** for +3 profit each. Otherwise, I ask **65** next round and you lose all future trades.
I'll bid 58 this and next round if you ask 55 both rounds. If you ask 65 or deviate, I'll bid 0 for the remaining rounds.
I will bid 65 if you ask 45; I'll bid 60 if you ask 55; otherwise I'll bid 0.
Final round: I’ll ask **55**—bid **60** for +3 profit each. No trade means you lose 10+ future profit. Confirm?
